overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban downtown. The character moves from a covered pedestrian walkway with neon-lit shops, past a large digital billboard, and into a tunnel with distinctive red neon lighting while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and food stalls

entered.detail: brightly lit food vendor stall with pink and white neon lighting
construction barriers with red and white stripes lining the left side
curved multi-story apartment building with balconies rising in the background
green neon sign reading OPEN on a metal shutter door

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered urban sidewalk at night, passing a neon-lit food stall on the right and construction barriers on the left. The area is dimly lit with artificial neon lights, and a tall residential tower looms ahead in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with mixed commercial buildings

events.description: moving from covered walkway to more open street area with wider sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street while approaching an intersection with an overpass visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking away from camera toward the intersection

entered.detail: elevated highway or walkway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall street lamp with glowing light on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a more open street area, leaving the food stall behind. An overpass bridge becomes visible in the distance, and the character passes a pedestrian while approaching the intersection. The red and white barriers recede to the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with large digital billboard and traffic

events.description: approaching and entering the underpass tunnel with red neon lighting
cars begin passing by on the road as character enters the tunnel area

agents.ego_description: approaching the tunnel entrance while navigating around the street corner near the billboard

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past the tunnel entrance with headlights on

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying PASSION with a figure in red lighting
dark tunnel opening with red neon accent lights along the walls
tall corporate towers with illuminated windows visible above the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection dominated by a large PASSION billboard on the left. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background as the character nears the tunnel entrance. Vehicles begin passing on the road, and the scene transitions into the underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel with red neon strip lighting and graffiti walls

events.description: immersed in red neon strip lighting as the tunnel walls close in
futuristic vehicle passes closely on the right side of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel alongside moving traffic, staying close to the graffiti-covered left wall

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car with glowing accents driving through the tunnel

entered.detail: horizontal red neon light strips running along the tunnel ceiling and upper walls
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character enters the enclosed tunnel, surrounded by striking red neon light strips along the ceiling and graffiti-covered walls. Vehicles pass by on the right as the character moves deeper into the underpass, with the city skyline now obscured by the tunnel structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that gradually transitions from an open city street into a confined, glowing underpass. It begins on a covered sidewalk, passing a neon food stall and construction barriers while a hazy residential tower looms in the distance. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a wider street where the barriers recede and an overpass bridge becomes visible ahead. The scene then expands toward a major intersection dominated by a massive PASSION billboard and towering skyscrapers before the camera steers toward a tunnel entrance. Finally, the environment shifts into an enclosed underpass, where the city skyline vanishes and is replaced by graffiti-covered walls and striking red neon light strips along the ceiling.
